title: ST ANTHONY EMERGENCY FAMILY SHELTER - 211info
text: ST VINCENT DE PAUL MEDFORD ST ANTHONY EMERGENCY FAMILY SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a emergency shelter for families. 2424 N Pacific Highway Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: -Homeless families (single males with children, single females with children, and couples with children). No animals allowed. -Must be able to pass a criminal background check. Age 12 and older must be able to pass a drug test. No substance use allowed on site. Hours: Shelter: 7 days per week 4pm-10am Sign in: Monday-Friday 10am-11am Interviews: By appointment Email (541) 772-3828 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 772-3828 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Birth certificates for children and photo ID for adults AREA SERVED: Jackson County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 10am-2pm Services: Community Shelters * Homeless Families Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - DINING ROOM FOOD - FOOD PANTRY MATERIAL GOODS - SOCIAL SERVICES MATERIAL GOODS - THRIFT STORE MATERIAL GOODS - URBAN REST STOP UTILITIES - UTILITY AND RENT ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ST VINCENT DE PAUL MEDFORD
